ground_truth.title: Product-FARM - High-Performance Domain-Agnostic Rule Engine
ground_truth.main_content: Product-FARM is a high-performance, domain-agnostic rule engine with visual configuration, AI-powered assistance, and sub-microsecond evaluation. It features immutable product versioning, template cloning, horizontal scalability through DGraph, intelligent LRU caching, fine-grained RBAC, microservice-ready architecture, tiered compilation engine with bytecode optimization, DAG-based parallel execution, no-code visual builder, and REST + gRPC APIs. The engine achieves ~330ns rule evaluation, 3M+ evals/sec single-threaded, 22M+ evals/sec parallel, with 85% test coverage supporting 10K+ rules per product. Industries served include insurance, financial services, e-commerce, healthcare, manufacturing, and logistics.
with: Build Complex Business Logic with Product-FARM, an enterprise-grade rule engine with AI-powered configuration
Sub-microsecond evaluation at ~330ns per rule with 3.5x bytecode speedup and parallel DAG execution
Immutable Product Versioning enables cloning products for experimentation with full audit trail and instant rollback
AI-Powered Configuration creates rules from natural language and explains complex logic with optimization suggestions
Domain-agnostic rule engine serving insurance, finance, e-commerce, healthcare, manufacturing, and logistics industries

items.caption: Product-FARM Dashboard showing rule management interface

Interactive Rule DAG Visualization showing dependencies
Visual Expression Builder for drag-and-drop rule creation
